title: Yellow River Trail
notes: Known for its unglaciated, hilly landscape, this remote counterclockwise overnight backpacking loop covers 14 miles in the Driftless Area of Iowa and showcases the state's most rugged terrain with a route that crosses ravines, climbs sandstone bluffs, and provides views of the surrounding hardwood forests and wildlife.

images.title: Browns Hollow
images.notes: Lovely fall colors greeted us as we began the trail

images.title: Browns Trailhead
images.notes: Heading back to civlization after a restless night in the woods, thanks to a create trying to force its way underneath my tent
